summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Carib Hut restaurant website. All major functionality working correctly with 95%+ success rate. Navigation, mobile menu, scroll functionality, and content display all tested successfully.

ui_bugs.issue: Main hero image (Caribbean atmosphere) fails to load from Unsplash URL

integration_issues.issue: Scroll indicator element not stable for clicking due to continuous animation

passed_tests: Desktop navigation (Home, Menu, Drinks, About Us, Contact) works
Hero section displays with correct content and buttons
Menu section displays 17 items with prices and tags (Popular, Spicy, Vegan, New)
Featured dishes (3) display with working images
Drinks section shows all categories (Rum Cocktails, Mocktails, Beer & Cider, Wine)
About section loads with founder story and value cards
Contact section shows address, phone, email, and hours
Scroll to section functionality works for navigation, buttons, and links
CTA buttons (Book a Table, Explore Menu) scroll to correct sections
Image loading: 7 of 8 images load successfully
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix broken hero image URL (https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1540206395-68808...) - replace with working Unsplash URL or local image. Consider reducing scroll indicator animation intensity for better user interaction.
